title: Answer the flicker
hint: Select Pip, then FEED, WASH, or PLAY once.

title: Place a Dew Loom
hint: Open BUILD, choose Dew Loom, and place it on clear ground.

title: Bring the Loom online
hint: Pip will carry materials. Keep its needs above half while construction finishes.

title: Welcome a second voice
hint: Keep every vital need high. A healthy, mature Luma divides naturally.

title: Form a small chorus
hint: Support 3 living Luma. Reward: enough research for your first discovery.

title: Choose a colony role
hint: Open COLONY → LUMA and assign one job—or cycle back to autonomy.

title: Build a Mist Basin
hint: Automate clarity before the colony becomes crowded.

title: Make a discovery
hint: Open COLONY → RESEARCH and unlock any branch with your 20 RP.

title: Begin a facility upgrade
hint: Select a completed building and choose its QUALITY or CAPACITY path.

title: Finish the upgrade
hint: Keep a builder healthy while the improved facility comes online.

title: Build a Chime Grove
hint: Give the growing colony a shared place for joy and friendship.

title: Reach the care threshold
hint: Support 6 living Luma without letting urgent needs pile up.

title: Earn habitat level 2
hint: Healthy Luma and completed guidance steps build reputation over time.

title: Commission a Deep Taker
hint: Industry creates resources quickly, but its pollution changes the habitat.

title: Cross the habitat boundary
hint: Open COLONY → EXPLORE and send 2–3 Luma to Whisper Grove.

title: Decide what discovery means
hint: Open COLONY → EXPLORE and preserve the site or salvage its relic.

title: Map a distant region
hint: Complete enough expeditions to scout one region to 100%. Each successful return reveals a large part of the map.

title: Establish a regional relay
hint: Open COLONY → EXPLORE, select a fully scouted region, and build its persistent outpost.

title: Connect the regional network
hint: Staff the outpost and build a supply route so its stored production reaches Lumen Field.

title: Unlock advanced research
hint: Use expedition rare matter to raise any research branch to level 3.

title: Evolve a facility
hint: Select a level-2 facility and use regional rare matter to ascend it to level 3.

title: Open Mirror Marsh
hint: Maintain a thriving habitat until reputation unlocks the third regional permit.

title: Answer the Audit
hint: Grow the colony, reach the final question, and choose what freedom means.

title: Remember the silent
hint: Loss is recorded, but it never blocks the main journey.
